goal: Finish the comprehensive visual catalog of the full Cute Fantasy arsenal, then write a self-contained handoff prompt for the story/planning chat.
completed: Ran scratchpad/catalog_gen.py -> 22 category contact sheets across all 11 packs (frame0-crop for creatures/characters, whole-montage for tiles/objects); joined the earlier cast/buildings/ui for 25 total in docs/asset-previews/.

Viewed every sheet and rewrote docs/asset-catalog.md into a searchable 'arsenal' reference: a quick where-is index, exact folder paths per category, frame-layout notes, and a casting board mapping sprites to Evan/Irene/Ariana + pond life.

Wrote docs/story-handoff.md: a paste-ready prompt embedding the FULL inventory as text (so the story chat needs no repo access) + which contact-sheet PNGs to attach + 10 concrete v1 decisions to answer, under the roadmap scope rules.

Committed + pushed both (1ec37ae catalog, 7111caf handoff) on claude/slice-1-godot-toolchain-ij6e9w; verified scripts/island_map.gd byte-untouched vs origin (standing hold intact); confirmed docs/.gdignore covers all preview PNGs so Godot skips them.
Sent Chris animals/tiles/buildings sheets so he can see the roster.
discovered: Full inventory confirmed: 8 premade cozy NPCs; a modular player (Hair_1-6 x ~8 colors, 5 shirt sets, tools, rideable Horse) to build a custom Irene; 14 fantasy fighters (Angels/Goblins/Knights/Orcs); 13 animal species incl. Duck(=Ariana), Horse(~6 colors), Capybara/Goose/Swan/Frog; enemies (Skeleton sword/bow/mage, Slime 5 colors x 3 sizes, Bombschroom).
Buildings give distinct silhouettes for the story: Market_Stalls = Evan's shop, Inn/Church = the library, plus barn/coop/silo/windmill/greenhouse/fisherman's house.

Terrain set is far richer than the 3 we ship: beach, cobble, cliff, cave, waterfall, farmland, wood+stone bridges, all with autotile edges. Full UI kit (HP bars, speech/book panels, buttons, font) covers every remaining v1 system.
7 themed biome packs (Desert/Dungeons/ShroomLands/MilitaryCamp/Halloween/Volcano/Christmas) cataloged as future-game arsenal; Old_Sprites(242)=legacy, ignore.
decisions: docs/asset-catalog.md is the durable searchable reference; docs/asset-index.md lists all 1,220 files with dimensions; contact sheets live in docs/asset-previews/ (gdignored via docs/.gdignore).

Story handoff is text-first: the inventory travels as text in the prompt; PNGs are attached separately because the story chat can't read the repo. Filenames in the prompt match sheet names so the mapping holds even without vision.
Casting recommendations recorded (not locked): Ariana=Duck; Evan=Chef_Chloe/Bartender_Bruno + Market_Stalls; library=Inn(or Church); Irene=custom modular build; UI=this pack's kit.
lessons: For montaging multi-frame character/animal sheets, crop the top-left 64x64 idle frame first (frame0) then montage -- montaging whole sheets scales everything unreadably small.
Redirecting a long-running generator through 'tail -N' truncates its own manifest; keep the full stdout if you need the per-image montage index, or re-enumerate filenames with ls/find.
A cross-session handoff to a text-only planning chat must be self-contained: embed the inventory as text and name the images to attach -- don't assume it can see repo files or rendered PNGs.
files_changed: docs/story-handoff.md (new -- paste-ready story-session prompt + full inventory)
open_questions: Which cove variant does Chris lock for the live map (still on hold)?

The 10 story decisions in docs/story-handoff.md: Evan/Irene/Ariana casting, shop vs library buildings, Irene's modular look, the ~5 hardcoded lines, boss mechanic, pond-life density, critical path, tone.
2P camera rule (leash/zoom-out/clamp) -- deferred to the player-select step.
